allow: Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless -c "lua local ok, err = pcall\(function\(\) require\(''''nvim-treesitter-textobjects''''\).setup\({select = {lookahead = true}, move = {set_jumps = true}}\); local ts_select = require\(''''nvim-treesitter-textobjects.select''''\); local ts_move = require\(''''nvim-treesitter-textobjects.move''''\); local ts_swap = require\(''''nvim-treesitter-textobjects.swap''''\); print\(''''All modules loaded OK''''\) end\); print\(ok, err\)" -c "qa!")

Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless /Users/nelsonfleig/.config/nvim-nelson/lua/nelson/plugins/treesitter.lua -c "lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local msgs = vim.api.nvim_exec2\(''''messages'''', {output=true}\); print\(msgs.output\) end, 3000\)" -c "sleep 4" -c "qa!")

Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless /Users/nelsonfleig/.config/nvim-nelson/lua/nelson/plugins/treesitter.lua -c "lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local msgs = vim.api.nvim_exec2\(''''messages'''', {output=true}\); io.write\(msgs.output\); io.flush\(\); vim.cmd\(''''qa!''''\) end, 5000\)")
Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless -c "lua local ts = require\(''''nvim-treesitter''''\); print\(''''installed:'''', vim.inspect\(ts.get_installed\(\)\)\)" -c "qa!")

Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless -c "lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local msgs = vim.api.nvim_exec2\('messages', {output=true}\); io.write\(msgs.output or '\(no messages\)'\); io.flush\(\); vim.cmd\('qa!'\) end, 2000\)" 2>&1)

Bash(NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-nelson nvim --headless -c 'lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local msgs = vim.api.nvim_exec2\("messages", {output=true}\); io.write\(msgs.output or "\(no messages\)"\); io.flush\(\); vim.cmd\("qa!"\) end, 2000\)' 2>&1)
